title: task
description: edhoc.rs:140 and lib.rs:649 - CBOR text string encoding uses (0x60 | len) which only works for lengths 0-23. Longer strings need 0x78 followed by length byte. Current code is safe (labels are all short), but adding a label > 23 chars would produce invalid CBOR silently. Should add length check or use proper multi-byte encoding.
close_reason: Fixed: Added proper CBOR text string encoding for lengths > 23 in edhoc.rs:140 and lib.rs:649. Uses 0x78 + length byte for strings 24-255 chars, matching the bstr encoding pattern elsewhere in the files.
